name: Da Qiao

skills.name: Law of Infinity
skills.description: Grants a Movement Speed boost to herself and a nearby teammate. Thetides created by her skills deal extra damage when they overlap

skills.name: Leaping Koi Tide
skills.description: Launches and damages enemies in a line ahead, leaving a tide that dealscontinuous damage. Gains Movement Speed when using skills.

skills.name: Sea of Fate
skills.description: Conjures a magic circle that teleports her and an ally within it back to Baserestoring their Mana and granting a Movement Speed boost

skills.name: Severing Surge
skills.description: Launches and damages enemies along a line, leaving a tide that deals

tips: Da Qiao is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.1% win rate and 0.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Frozen Breath → Breakthrough Robe → Venomous Staff → Mask of Agony.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Da Qiao's Support kit. Take Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Leaping Koi Tide → Sea of Fate → Severing Surge → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
Da Qiao excels into Luna, Mozi. Avoid blind picking into Arke, Han Xin without team peel.

Da Qiao is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.1% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Da Qiao.

faqs.question: Is Da Qiao good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Da Qiao is Tier A Support with 49.1% win rate, 0.9% pick rate, and 0.5% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Da Qiao build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Resistance, Frozen Breath, Breakthrough Robe, Venomous Staff, Mask of Agony, nightmare. Run Nightmare arcana with Heal. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Da Qiao?
faqs.answer: Pick Arke, Han Xin into Da Qiao. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Da Qiao completes core items. Da Qiao struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Da Qiao counter?
faqs.answer: Da Qiao is strong into Luna, Mozi according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Da Qiao when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Da Qiao good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Da Qiao is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.1% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Da Qiao.

faqs.question: What lane should Da Qiao play?
faqs.answer: Da Qiao is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support, Mage). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Da Qiao?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Heal. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Da Qiao or Dolia — which is better?
faqs.answer: Da Qiao vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Da Qiao has +3.0% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Da Qiao when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Da Qiao?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 0.5% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Support.
